title: LNT or CNP: Which Is a Better Utility Power Stock to Pick?
text: At present, Alliant Energy (LNT) appears to be a better choice in the utility space compared with CenterPoint Energy (CNP).

title: 5 Defensive Picks to Stay Safe in Volatile September
text: We have narrowed our search to five utility stocks with growth potential for the rest of 2022. These are: NEE, SO, ATO, ETR and LNT.
